relationships: ber:Dzayer tesεa tadɣert n yiweẓla d tameggafsut
ber:Layla tesεa ɣur-s taferrast akken ad tḥudd iman-is
ber:Yanni yenna-d dakken tameddurt ulac d acu n unamek i tesεa
ber:Tom iger tamawt dakken Mary tella tesεa amrig
ber:Tamurt n Leqbayel tesεa aṭas n yiɣerman ihuskayen
ber:Tamsulta tella tesεa ssebba ay tt-yeǧǧan ad tcikk deg Sami
ber:Tamurt n Leqbayel, deg Zzayer, tesεa idraren d iɣudanen
